meta.title: Billing dispute with missed callback frustration
meta.description: Caller upset about statement balance and prior callback failure — route to billing team.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Cascade Family Dentistry, this is Aly.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: My name is Karen Webb. I got a bill for four hundred fifty dollars and nobody called me back from yesterday.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: I'm sorry about that. Let me get your information for our billing team.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I've been calling all day about this charge.
